title: Delhi High Court protects personality rights of Lucknow Supergiants owner Sanjiv Goenka
description: The Delhi High Court on Wednesday agreed to protect the personality rights of industrialist Dr Sanjiv Goenka, owner of Indian Premier League (IPL) franchise Lucknow Super Giants, in a plea alleging abusive social media content during the ongoing IPL season [Dr Sanjiv Goenka Vs Google].Justice Tushar Rao Gedela agreed to pass the direction after Goenka flagged multiple instances of posts misusing his likeness through morphed images circulating online. It was argued that the content, shared widely
